title: International real residential property prices
description: BIS selected series improve comparability but differ in national source coverage and aggregate weighting.
plainLanguageSummary: BIS selected series improve comparability but differ in national source coverage and aggregate weighting.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: BIS selected series improve comparability but differ in national source coverage and aggregate weighting.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: BIS selected series improve comparability but differ in national source coverage and aggregate weighting.
